name: Lazy Dazy Cake
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Light brown sugar, firmly packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour once, measure, and sift together three times with baking powder and salt.
2. Heat milk, butter, and lemon rind over low flame until butter is melted (do not scald). Remove from heat and cool slightly.
3. Add lemon juice to eggs and beat until thick and lemon-colored.
4. Gradually add sugar, beating until light and fluffy.
5. Add flour alternately with warm milk mixture, mixing quickly but thoroughly.
6. Grease a 10x10 inch pan and bake in a moderate oven (350°F) for 35 minutes, or until done.
7. In a separate bowl, combine brown sugar, cream, melted butter, and shredded coconut; mix lightly until thoroughly blended.
8. Spread the mixture evenly over the top of the cake.
9. Return the cake to the oven and bake an additional 11-15 minutes, or until the brown sugar mixture caramelizes.
10. Cut into squares. Serve warm.
